mnemonics.title: PKI Components
mnemonics.content: CA-RA-CR-PKG (Certificate Authority, Registration Authority, Certificate Repository, Private Key Generator)

mnemonics.title: PKI Process
mnemonics.content: K-C-R-V (Key pair generation, Certificate request, Certificate issuance, Verification)

mnemonics.title: X.509 Certificate Contents
mnemonics.content: S-P-V (Subject's name, Public key, Validity period)

mnemonics.title: PKI Applications
mnemonics.content: S-E-V-D (Secure web browsing, Email encryption, Virtual private networks, Digital signatures)
